placeholder_standby: Waiting for new studies on server
placeholder_not_configured: PACS server scan is not configured
placeholder_no_studies: No studies found on PACS server
settings_cleanup: Auto Cleanup Old Studies in Archive:
dlg_confirm_delete_msg:
Are you sure you want to permanently delete patient
"{}" ({}) from disk?
dlg_confirm_delete_archive_msg:
Are you sure you want to permanently delete archive patient
"{}" ({}) from disk?
dlg_error_ct_dir: CT Images working folder is not configured correctly.
update_up_to_date: You are using the latest version.
dlg_ct_archive_same: CT Images folder and CT Archive folder cannot be the same folder.
dlg_archive_empty_path:
Auto archive is enabled but no archive folder is set.
Please specify the archive path or disable auto archive.
dlg_aet_too_long:
AE Title must not exceed 16 characters per DICOM standard.

AET Remote: "{}" ({} chars)
AET Local: "{}" ({} chars)

Please correct the values.
dlg_ping_ip_empty: Please enter the PACS server IP address.
dlg_update_available_msg:
New version available: {}.

Would you like to open the download page?
dlg_update_current_msg: You are using the latest version of the application.
dlg_server_exists: A server with this name already exists.
dlg_del_server_msg: Are you sure you want to delete PACS server '{}'?
ping_success:
Connection established successfully!
PACS server responded to ping and allowed search (device is registered).
ping_aet_local_too_long: Error: Local AE Title (AET Local) '{}' exceeds 16 characters.
ping_aet_remote_too_long: Error: Remote AE Title (AET Remote) '{}' exceeds 16 characters.
ping_echo_bad_status: Error: PACS server returned status code {} for C-ECHO.
ping_cfind_unregistered:
Connected but device not registered!

PACS server responded to C-ECHO (ping) but dropped connection during C-FIND (search).
Check that local AE Title (AET Local: "{}") and this computer's IP are registered on the PACS server, or AET Remote ("{}") is incorrect.
ping_timeout:
Error: Could not connect to PACS server at {}:{}.

Connection timed out.
Check that the PACS server is running, the IP address is correct, and the connection is not blocked by a firewall.
ping_refused:
Error: Could not connect to PACS server at {}:{}.

Connection refused.
Check that PACS port ({}) is correct and the PACS service is running on the server.
ping_called_not_recognized:
Error: PACS server rejected the DICOM association.

Reason: Remote AE Title (AET Remote: "{}") is not recognized by the server.

Check the spelling of AET Remote (it is case-sensitive).
ping_rejected_with_reason:
Error: PACS server rejected the association.
Reason: {}.
ping_generic_fail:
Error: Could not establish connection to PACS server.
Check the IP address, port, and AE Titles.
main_err_missing_qt:
Failed to load PyQt6 or PyQt5 components. This is usually because the Microsoft Visual C++ Redistributable (MSVC++) package is not installed on this computer.

Please download and install the Visual C++ Redistributable package (versions 2015-2022) from the official Microsoft website and run the program again.
main_err_details_qt6: Error details (PyQt6): Failed to load DLL
loading_fixing_folders_status: Fixing Patient ID and renaming folders...
